ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "full_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team in full time */,
  "full_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team in full time */,
  "full_time_result" TEXT /* Full time result (H, D, A for Home win, Draw, Away win) */,
  "half_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team in half time */,
  "half_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team in half time */,
  "half_time_result" TEXT /* Half time result (H, D, A for Home win, Draw, Away win) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee assigned to the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's current coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's kit */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the league */,
  "number_of_titles" INTEGER /* Total number of titles won by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistics record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the home team */,
  "away_corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the away team */,
  "home_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the home team */,
  "away_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the away team */,
  "home_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the home team */,
  "away_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the away team */,
  "home_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession time by the home team */,
  "away_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession time by the away team */,
  "home_pass_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of passes made by the home team */,
  "away_pass_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of passes made by the away team */,
  "home_offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the home team */,
  "away_offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the away team */,
  "home_saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the home team's goalkeeper */,
  "away_saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the away team's goalkeeper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
